command: ls -la && echo '---' && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

for f in SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md AGENTS.md HEARTBEAT.md BOOTSTRAP.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- FILE: $f"; sed -n '1,220p' "$f"; }; done; d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
import datetime
print((datetime.datetime.utcnow().date()-datetime.timedelta(days=1)).isoformat())
PY
); for f in memory/$d.md memory/$y.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- FILE: $f"; sed -n '1,220p' "$f"; }; done
